name: Lemon Squeezy (Digital Products)
description: Integrate Lemon Squeezy for selling digital products, SaaS subscriptions, and licenses. They are the Merchant of Record — they handle VAT, sales tax, and EU compliance. Includes webhook handler and license key activation.

steps.description: Create Lemon Squeezy client with configureLemonSqueezy()
Create checkout URL generation with customer email pre-fill and success redirect
Handle order_created, subscription_created, subscription_cancelled, license_key_created webhooks
Create activateLicense(key, instanceId), deactivateLicense(), validateLicense() using Lemon Squeezy Licensing API
